title: Add email + password form fields to /signup
description: Add the name, email, and password form fields to signup.html with validation UI and a submit button.
acceptance_criteria: Form has three fields: Full Name (text), Email (email type), Password (password type)
Password field shows a helper: 'Min 8 characters, include at least one number'
All fields show inline error messages below them (initially hidden, shown on validation failure)
Form has id='signup-form' for JS targeting

steps.details: Min 8 characters, include at least one number
Inputs: width: 100%; padding: 10px 12px; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 6px; margin-bottom: 16px. Submit button: full-width, brand primary colour, 48px height.

technical_notes: No JS logic here. Submission handler is added in TASK-015.
